description: Authoritative source of gateway file paths and allowed import patterns. Consumed by ci.js (checkGatewayImports) and domain-isolation.test.js (gateway enforcement tests) to enforce the gateway pattern consistently — both load this file directly, so adding or changing a rule here automatically updates both enforcement paths. Domain-tier packages (rex, sourcevision) are not listed here because they do not import from sibling or upper-tier packages — their isolation is enforced by domain-isolation.test.js instead. Foundation-tier imports (@n-dx/llm-client) are gated in hench via llm-gateway.ts; other tiers may import directly.

allowedNonGatewayFiles.reason: cli/errors.ts imports foundation error primitives (CLIError, ClaudeClientError, etc.) directly from @n-dx/llm-client. Routing through prd/llm-gateway.ts would violate the intra-hench rule that cli/ must not depend on prd/ (see packages/hench/tests/integration/zone-boundary.test.ts). Foundation-tier imports are permitted here because they carry no prd-zone coupling.

internalBarrels.description: Sole public surface for the viewer messaging subsystem — must remain re-export-only
Sole public surface for the crash recovery sub-zone — cross-zone consumers must import from this barrel, not crash internals
Viewer outbound gateway — concentrates all viewer-side imports from schema/, shared/, and messaging/
Viewer inbound API barrel — sanctioned import surface for sibling zones (crash, route, performance, usage)

boundaries.message: server/ must not import from viewer/ (use gateway or shared types)
